column1: # SR2 core Equipment Table ("Street Gear", book p.254+) — the CANONICAL price
# list (see CLAUDE.md). Transcribed from rendered PDF pages, not the text layer:
# the text layer mis-aligns these columns badly. Where the combat chapter prints
# a different value, THIS table wins.
# damage "" = not a weapon / not applicable. type: p=physical, s=stun.
# bookPage is the PRINTED page (the footer folio), not a PDF page: the offset
# is not constant across the book. Verified against the corrected 11th printing.
# Assault rifles / heavy weapons (book p.255). Names are OURS where they differ from
# the printed row: Panther Assault Cannon = "Assault Cannon", Light Machine Gun
# Clothing & armor + commercial explosives (book p.257). `extra` carries the
